languages.text: "Стабильность работы получившихся модифицированных сервиторов не поддается прогностированию. Духи машин корабля могут оказаться беззащитными и пасть жертвой энтропии, что начнет множиться в вычислительном цикле".

"The operational stability of the resulting modified servitors cannot be prognosticated. The ship's machine spirits may find themselves defenceless and fall victim to entropy, which would begin to multiply within the computational cycle."
languages.original_text: "Стабильность работы получившихся модифицированных сервиторов не поддается прогностированию. Духи машин корабля могут оказаться беззащитными и пасть жертвой энтропии, что начнет множиться в вычислительном цикле".

traits.locale_text: "The operational stability of the resulting modified servitors cannot be prognosticated. The ship's machine spirits may find themselves defenceless and fall victim to entropy, which would begin to multiply within the computational cycle."

"The operational stability of the resulting modified servitors cannot be prognosticated. The ship's machine spirits may find themselves defenceless and fall victim to entropy, which would begin to multiply within the computational cycle."

languages.text: "Die operative Stabilität der resultierenden modifizierten Servitoren lässt sich nicht prognostizieren. Die Maschinengeister des Schiffs könnten ihrer Wehrhaftigkeit beraubt Opfer der Entropie werden, was sich innerhalb des Rechenzyklus multiplizieren würde."
languages.original_text: "The operational stability of the resulting modified servitors cannot be prognosticated. The ship's machine spirits may find themselves defenceless and fall victim to entropy, which would begin to multiply within the computational cycle."

traits.locale_text: "Die operative Stabilität der resultierenden modifizierten Servitoren lässt sich nicht prognostizieren. Die Maschinengeister des Schiffs könnten ihrer Wehrhaftigkeit beraubt Opfer der Entropie werden, was sich innerhalb des Rechenzyklus multiplizieren würde."

languages.text: « Il est impossible de prédire la stabilité opérationnelle des servitors modifiés ainsi obtenus. Les esprits de la machine du vaisseau pourraient se retrouver sans défense et succomber à l'entropie, qui commencerait alors à se propager au sein du cycle calculatoire. »
languages.original_text: "The operational stability of the resulting modified servitors cannot be prognosticated. The ship's machine spirits may find themselves defenceless and fall victim to entropy, which would begin to multiply within the computational cycle."

traits.locale_text: « Il est impossible de prédire la stabilité opérationnelle des servitors modifiés ainsi obtenus. Les esprits de la machine du vaisseau pourraient se retrouver sans défense et succomber à l'entropie, qui commencerait alors à se propager au sein du cycle calculatoire. »

languages.text: “改造后机仆的运作稳定性无法预判。舰船的机魂可能会陷入无力自卫的境地，沦为熵的牺牲品，而熵会在计算循环中成倍增殖。”
languages.original_text: "The operational stability of the resulting modified servitors cannot be prognosticated. The ship's machine spirits may find themselves defenceless and fall victim to entropy, which would begin to multiply within the computational cycle."

traits.locale_text: “改造后机仆的运作稳定性无法预判。舰船的机魂可能会陷入无力自卫的境地，沦为熵的牺牲品，而熵会在计算循环中成倍增殖。”

languages.text: «La estabilidad operativa de los servidores modificados resultantes no se puede pronosticar. Los espíritus máquina de la nave podrían quedar indefensos y ser víctimas de la entropía, que empezaría a multiplicarse en el ciclo computacional».
languages.original_text: "The operational stability of the resulting modified servitors cannot be prognosticated. The ship's machine spirits may find themselves defenceless and fall victim to entropy, which would begin to multiply within the computational cycle."

traits.locale_text: «La estabilidad operativa de los servidores modificados resultantes no se puede pronosticar. Los espíritus máquina de la nave podrían quedar indefensos y ser víctimas de la entropía, que empezaría a multiplicarse en el ciclo computacional».

languages.text: 「出来上がる改造サーヴィターの動作安定性は予測しようがない。艦の機械霊は無防備となってエントロピーの餌食になりかねず、それは計算サイクルの内部で増殖し始めるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "The operational stability of the resulting modified servitors cannot be prognosticated. The ship's machine spirits may find themselves defenceless and fall victim to entropy, which would begin to multiply within the computational cycle."

traits.locale_text: 「出来上がる改造サーヴィターの動作安定性は予測しようがない。艦の機械霊は無防備となってエントロピーの餌食になりかねず、それは計算サイクルの内部で増殖し始めるだろう。」

languages.text: "Ortaya çıkan değiştirilmiş hizmetörlerin operasyonel istikrarı tahmin edilemez. Geminin makine ruhları, kendilerini savunmasız bulabilir ve hesaplama döngüsü içinde çoğalmaya başlayacak olan entropiye kurban gidebilirler."
languages.original_text: "The operational stability of the resulting modified servitors cannot be prognosticated. The ship's machine spirits may find themselves defenceless and fall victim to entropy, which would begin to multiply within the computational cycle."

traits.locale_text: "Ortaya çıkan değiştirilmiş hizmetörlerin operasyonel istikrarı tahmin edilemez. Geminin makine ruhları, kendilerini savunmasız bulabilir ve hesaplama döngüsü içinde çoğalmaya başlayacak olan entropiye kurban gidebilirler."
